      "content": "| response.output\\_text.delta | Next chunk of assistant text tokens | item\\_id, output\\_index, content\\_index, delta, logprobs?, sequence\\_number | Append delta to your text buffer; optionally record logprobs. | response.reasoning\\_text.delta | Streaming reasoning text | item\\_id, output\\_index, content\\_index, delta, sequence\\_number | Append delta to reasoning-text buffer (usually not shown to end-users). | response.function\\_call\\_arguments.delta | Streaming JSON arguments for the call | item\\_id, output\\_index, delta, sequence\\_number | Append raw JSON to an args buffer (string); don’t parse until done. | response.custom\\_tool\\_call\\_input.delta | Streaming input for the tool | item\\_id, output\\_index, delta, sequence\\_number | Append raw input; wait for completion to parse/consume. | response.custom\\_tool\\_call\\_input.done | Final complete input | item\\_id, output\\_index, input, sequence\\_number | Consume/dispatch to your tool implementation. | response.mcp\\_call\\_arguments.delta | Streaming MCP arguments (JSON string) | item\\_id, output\\_index, delta, sequence\\_number | Append to args buffer. | response.file\\_search\\_call.completed | Search finished | output\\_index, item\\_id, sequence\\_number | Read results array from the item (file\\_id, text, score, etc.). | response.web\\_search\\_call.completed | Search call finished | output\\_index, item\\_id, sequence\\_number | Read final status/results from item; cite sources.",
